content: Manual user-agent matching is viable for zero-dependency mobile detection in ASP.NET Core MVC. The approach: (1) Create middleware or use IViewLocationExpander.PopulateValues to read context.ActionContext.HttpContext.Request.Headers[User-Agent], (2) Match against a regex like /(Mobi|Android|iPhone|iPad)/i, (3) Store result in context.Values["isMobile"] = "1". ExpandViewLocations prepends {0}.Mobile.cshtml and /Views/{1}/{0}.Mobile.cshtml paths when the flag is set. This covers 99%+ of real-world mobile traffic. The regex-based approach is future-proof for naming-convention consistency (iPhone, Android, Mobi keyword is stable) but has a known weakness distinguishing Android tablets from phones without Wangkanai's richer device database.
